records.display_name: Woodhaven Blvd / Metropolitan Av - Planned treatments

payload.claim_text: Woodhaven Blvd / Metropolitan Av will maintain alignment and operational hours of bus lanes; upgrade 5 Bus Stops (2 Bus Bulbs), 23 Sidewalk Extensions, 20 Shortened Crossings, 6 Reconstructed Medians; add 7 Additional Crossings, 5 Raised Crosswalks, 20+ Street Trees

records.raw_text: Woodhaven Blvd / Metropolitan Av: Maintain: Alignment of bus lanes, Operational hours of bus lanes. Upgrade: 5 Bus Stops (2 Bus Bulbs), 23 Sidewalk Extensions, 20 Shortened Crossings, 6 Reconstructed Medians. Add: 7 Additional Crossings, 5 Raised Crosswalks, 20+ Street Trees

records.display_name: Woodhaven Blvd Phase B - Planned treatments

payload.claim_text: Woodhaven Blvd Phase B will maintain alignment and operational hours of bus lanes; upgrade 16 Bus Stops, 17 Sidewalk Extensions, 12 Shortened Crossings, 38 Medians/Median Tips; add 7 Additional Crossings, 3 Raised Crosswalks, 75+ Street Trees, 10,000+ ft2 Landscaped Area

records.raw_text: Woodhaven Blvd Phase B: Maintain: Alignment of bus lanes, Operational hours of bus lanes. Upgrade: 16 Bus Stops, 17 Sidewalk Extensions, 12 Shortened Crossings, 38 Medians/Median Tips. Add: 7 Additional Crossings, 3 Raised Crosswalks, 75+ Street Trees, 10,000+ ft2 Landscaped Area

records.display_name: Woodhaven Blvd Phase C - Planned treatments

payload.claim_text: Woodhaven Blvd Phase C will maintain alignment and operational hours of bus lanes, complement improvements made by Woodhaven Blvd Phase B and Woodhaven Blvd / Metropolitan Av; upgrade Bus Stops, Sidewalk Extensions, Shortened Crossings, Reconstructed Medians; add Crossings, Raised Crosswalks, Street Trees & Landscaping, Improved Lighting

records.raw_text: Woodhaven Blvd Phase C: Maintain: Alignment of bus lanes, Operational hours of bus lanes, Complement improvements made by Woodhaven Blvd Phase B and Woodhaven Blvd / Metropolitan Av. Upgrade: Bus Stops, Sidewalk Extensions, Shortened Crossings, Reconstructed Medians. Add: Crossings, Raised Crosswalks, Street Trees & Landscaping, Improved Lighting

records.display_name: 2017 Street Improvement Project (Woodhaven Blvd)

description: 6.85 miles of bus lanes installed on Woodhaven Blvd as part of Q52/Q53 Select Bus Service (SBS) launch in 2017

6.85 miles of bus lanes installed on Woodhaven Blvd as part of Q52/Q53 SBS launch in 2017. Included offset, median, and curbside alignments; bus boarding islands at 12 bus stops; bus stop amenities; pedestrian safety measures at 14 intersections; refurbished medians with ADA compliant pedestrian refuges at 11 intersections.

Installed 6.85 miles of bus lanes, bus boarding islands for 12 bus stops, bus stop amenities, pedestrian safety measures at 14 intersections, and refurbished medians with ADA compliant pedestrian refuges at 11 intersections as part of Q52/Q53 SBS launch in 2017.
